headline: PayPal Reshapes Venmo Segment As Investors Weigh Valuation And Earnings Outlook
summary: PayPal Holdings (NasdaqGS:PYPL) is restructuring its organization, designating Venmo as a standalone reporting segment. The company plans to appoint a new Venmo leader with digital banking experience to guide the business. The changes are intended to increase transparency into Venmo’s performance and expand future options for the asset, including a potential sale or partnership. For investors watching digital payments, Venmo has become a key part of how PayPal connects with younger and...
